zh.Pulford, Chester, England: 英國英格蘭爾普爾福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Pulford於大約1240年出生在英國爾普爾福德時，他的父親Robert Pulford67歲，母親Emma of Cheshire42歲。他於大約1267年與Margaret Chaumbleng在英國爾普爾福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1289年之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Pulford, Chester, England: 英国英格兰爾普爾福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Pulford于大约1240年出生在英国爾普爾福德时，他的父亲Robert Pulford67岁，母亲Emma of Cheshire42岁。他于大约1267年与Margaret Chaumbleng在英国爾普爾福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1289年之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pulford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pulford in Cheshire, so called from Old English pōl ‘pool, pond’ or perhaps pull ‘pool, creek’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Pulford was born about 1240, in Pulford, Cheshire, England, his father, Robert Pulford, was 67 and his mother, Emma of Cheshire, was 42. He married Margaret Chaumbleng about 1267, in Pulford, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 1289, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Pulford est né environ 1240, à Pulford, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Pulford, avait 67 ans et sa mère, Emma of Cheshire, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Chaumbleng environ 1267, à Pulford, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1289, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Pulford um 1240 in Pulford, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Pulford 67 und seine Mutter Emma of Cheshire 42. Er hat um 1267 in Pulford, Cheshire, England Margaret Chaumbleng geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1289 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Pulford è nato il circa 1240 nel Pulford, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Pulford, aveva 67 anni e il suo madre, Emma of Cheshire, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Chaumbleng circa 1267, nel Pulford, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1289, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Pulfordが約1240年にイギリスチェシュアイアプウルフォードで生まれた時，父Robert Pulfordは67歳，母Emma of Cheshireは42歳であった。約1267年にイギリスチェシュアイアプウルフォードでMargaret Chaumblengと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1289年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Pulford(이)가 대략 1240년 영국 체실르 풀퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Pulford(은)는 67세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma of Cheshire(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1267년 영국 체실르 풀퍼드에서 Margaret Chaumbleng(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1289년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Pulford, Chester, England: Pulford, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Pulford nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Pulford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Pulford, tinha 67 anos e sua mãe, Emma of Cheshire, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Chaumbleng aproximadamente 1267, em Pulford, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 1289, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Pulford родился около 1240 г. в местности пулфорд, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Pulford было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma of Cheshire, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Chaumbleng около 1267 г. в местности пулфорд, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1289 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Pulford nació aproximadamente 1240, en Pulford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Pulford, tenía 67 años y su mamá, Emma of Cheshire, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Margaret Chaumbleng aproximadamente 1267, en Pulford, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 1289, en su pueblo.
